parameters.query:
SELECT cash, burn_rate, projected_revenue, runway_months, alert_level, safe_budget, currency, calculated_at, warnings
FROM treasury_snapshots
WHERE tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 2;

parameters.name: context
parameters.value: ={{JSON.stringify({ runway_months: $('Build Treasury Explanation Prompt').first().json.runway_months, burn_rate: $('Build Treasury Explanation Prompt').first().json.burn_rate })}}

parameters.text:
🚨 *Treasury Calculation Failed*

The treasury snapshot could not be calculated.
Error: ={{$json.error}}

_Manual review required. Check Supabase logs._

meta.description: UC12+13+14: Python calculates burn/runway, Claude explains (validated), Slack alerts if WARNING/CRITICAL.
